name: biz-vision-ai
description: BizVision AI is a premium, McKinsey-inspired SaaS application designed to validate business concepts before investing capital. The platform leverages SerpAPI to query Google Search, Trends, News, and Maps, and utilizes Groq (Llama-3.3) and Google Gemini to build detailed text reports, operational risks, competitor spreadsheets, and brand name viability profiles.
